mapper.insert: insert into ess_device ( member_id, group_id, device_name, location, capacity_kw, device_type, status, install_date, latitude, longitude, nx, ny, is_main, ess_capacity_kwh, current_charge_kwh, charge_efficiency, discharge_efficiency, electricity_rate ) values ( #{memberId}, #{groupId}, #{deviceName}, #{location}, #{capacityKw}, #{deviceType}, #{status}, COALESCE(#{installDate}, CURRENT_DATE), #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{nx}, #{ny}, 'N', #{essCapacityKwh}, #{currentChargeKwh}, #{chargeEfficiency}, #{dischargeEfficiency}, #{electricityRate} )
mapper.select:
select d.device_id as deviceId, d.member_id as memberId, d.group_id as groupId,
ifnull(g.group_name, '미지정 그룹') as groupName,
d.device_name as deviceName, d.location, d.capacity_kw as capacityKw, d.device_type as deviceType, d.status, d.install_date as installDate, d.latitude, d.longitude, d.nx, d.ny, d.is_main as isMain, d.ess_capacity_kwh as essCapacityKwh, d.current_charge_kwh as currentChargeKwh, d.charge_efficiency as chargeEfficiency, d.discharge_efficiency as dischargeEfficiency, d.electricity_rate as electricityRate
from ess_device d
left join ess_device_group g on d.group_id = g.group_id
where d.member_id = #{_parameter} and d.deleted_yn = 'N'
order by g.group_name asc, d.is_main desc, d.device_id desc
select count(*) from ess_device where member_id = #{_parameter} and deleted_yn = 'N'

select device_id as deviceId, member_id as memberId, group_id as groupId, device_name as deviceName, location, capacity_kw as capacityKw, device_type as deviceType, status, install_date as installDate, latitude, longitude, nx, ny, is_main as isMain, ess_capacity_kwh as essCapacityKwh, current_charge_kwh as currentChargeKwh, charge_efficiency as chargeEfficiency, discharge_efficiency as dischargeEfficiency, electricity_rate as electricityRate from ess_device where device_id = #{_parameter} and deleted_yn = 'N'

select device_id as deviceId, member_id as memberId, group_id as groupId, device_name as deviceName, location, capacity_kw as capacityKw, device_type as deviceType, status, install_date as installDate, latitude, longitude, nx, ny, is_main as isMain, ess_capacity_kwh as essCapacityKwh, current_charge_kwh as currentChargeKwh, charge_efficiency as chargeEfficiency, discharge_efficiency as dischargeEfficiency, electricity_rate as electricityRate from ess_device where member_id = #{_parameter} and is_main = 'Y' and deleted_yn = 'N' limit 1
mapper.update:
update ess_device
set is_main = 'N'
where member_id = #{memberId} and deleted_yn = 'N'
mapper.select: select device_id as deviceId, member_id as memberId, group_id as groupId, device_name as deviceName, location, capacity_kw as capacityKw, device_type as deviceType, status, install_date as installDate, latitude, longitude, nx, ny, is_main as isMain, ess_capacity_kwh as essCapacityKwh, current_charge_kwh as currentChargeKwh, charge_efficiency as chargeEfficiency, discharge_efficiency as dischargeEfficiency, electricity_rate as electricityRate from ess_device where status in ('NORMAL', 'ACTIVE')
